title: Undergraduate Programs - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Undergraduate Programs - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
Undergraduate Programs at Khoury College
With 56 combined majors and a top-ranked co-op program, our undergraduate programs allow you to harness CS to make a difference.
Our undergraduate programs in computer sciences — CS, cybersecurity, and data science — are designed to nurture students’ talents while preparing them for their next steps, whether they choose further education or to start their career in a computer science field.
Khoury College is committed to meeting every student where they are, providing a challenging curriculum that trains them to be excellent computer scientists while supporting their individual journeys. As such, beginning
fall 2025
we’re introducing a
new sequence of introductory computing courses
.
Four ways our undergraduate programs stand out
56 combined majors: Pursue your passion
56 combined majors: Pursue your passion
Khoury College offers 56 combined majors with more than 25 partner disciplines, more than any other college at Northeastern University. Ranging from Computer Science and Journalism to Data Science and Chemistry, our combined majors are carefully constructed degrees that allow students to explore multiple academic fields while staying on track for graduation.
Each combined major offers the opportunity for intense study in two disciplines with appropriate breadth in the liberal arts. Students take nine to 13 courses in each subject and at least one integrative course that binds the disciplines together. These programs offer an excellent educational opportunity for the ambitious student.
Combined majors
Co-op program: Ranked #1 in the US
Co-op program: Ranked #1 in the US
Northeastern’s renowned cooperative education program — which the university started in 1909 — is ranked #1 nationally according to
U.S. News & World Report
. Co-ops are available at a wide range of for-profit and nonprofit organizations, big and small. First-year internships provide a way to build your resume before seeking a full-time co-op.
The co-op program gives undergraduates a head start on their career as they integrate classroom skills into solving real-world problems at jobs that, in most cases, relate directly to students’ field of study. Many students go on to find job opportunities with their co-op companies, as well as build a professional network — and an impressive resume — before they even finish college.
Undergraduate co-ops
Research opportunities: Collaborate with top faculty
Research opportunities: Collaborate with top faculty
Every day, Khoury College researchers and talented students collaborate to make new discoveries. Whether for course credit or as part of a paid experience, students have the opportunity to offer fresh perspectives and insights, helping drive discoveries and innovation.
Undergraduate research
Global experience: Explore the world
Global experience: Explore the world
We encourage our students not just to explore the world, but also to experience it. Khoury undergraduate students work, study, and conduct research on seven continents through global experiences that include:
Dialogue of Civilizations:
Our faculty-led summer programs that focus on critical issues facing local and global students. Students spend about a month in-country — in places like Cuba, Peru, Iceland, and Germany — while taking two classes, visiting regional tech companies, and engaging with international experts in CS and other fields.
Study abroad:
Spend a semester abroad at one of Northeastern’s partner institutions while taking courses related to your major and that count towards your degree. Learn from local faculty members at a foreign university and immerse yourself in the culture of cities like Athens, Rome, Madrid, Cape Town, Budapest, Hong Kong, and Sydney.
Global co-op:
Tap into unparalleled career opportunities with international companies and organizations. You’ll gain professional experience in diverse cultures — from Canada and Germany to Ghana and Japan — while addressing key global challenges within the field of CS.
Global experience

56 combined majors
598 unique co-op employers
